_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Collaborate with appropriate personnel to address Personal Health Information (PHI), Personally Identifiable Information (PII), and other data privacy and data reusability concerns for AI solutions.
reference_document_element_description: Establish, communicate, and enforce enterprise-wide data and AI policies covering quality, privacy, security, ethics, and responsible use.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-A-002 (SP, cosine: 0.535), RC-T-010 (RC, cosine: 0.508).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.6/10 (raw 0.557). Shared vocabulary: [ai, data, privacy]. DCWF-only terms [address, appropriate, collaborate, concerns, health, identifiable] vs WIDAI-only terms [communicate, covering, enforce, enterprise, establish, ethics] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.864 (P=0.843, R=0.886). R exceeds P by 0.043 — the WIDAI KSA's 17 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 25 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.5%). "Collaborate with appropriate personnel to address Personal Health Information (P" and "Establish, communicate, and enforce enterprise-wide data and AI policies coverin" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.570 ≈ STS 0.557 (gap 0.013). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [ai, data, privacy] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.8%. Shared tokens: [ai, data, privacy]. DCWF-only: [address, appropriate, collaborate, concerns, health, identifiable]. WIDAI-only: [communicate, covering, enforce, enterprise, establish, ethics].
